title: Good Backpacks
description: 🎒 Good Backpacks adds fully configurable backpacks with a dedicated slot, keybind access, elytra compatibility, and support for custom backpacks via config.
body:
![Good Backpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50d6d7ee0e868d0b67f2e190d2f50dccb66bb67f.png)

🎒 **Good Backpacks** is a highly flexible and fully configurable backpack mod focused on convenience, balance, and modpack customization.

Unlike simple storage mods, **Good Backpacks** allows you to deeply customize how backpacks work — from basic behavior to adding entirely new backpacks with your own parameters via config. The mod adds 7 types of backpacks.

### ✨ Main Features
* 🧩 **Fully Configurable** — almost every aspect can be adjusted in the config
* 🛠 **Custom Backpacks** — add your own backpacks and define their size, behavior, and properties
* 🎒 **Dedicated Backpack Slot** — backpacks have their own slot, separate from armor
* 🦺 **Optional Chestplate Mode** — backpacks can be configured to use the chestplate slot
* 🪽 **Elytra Friendly** — backpacks do not interfere with elytra usage
* 🧥 **Cape Hiding** — the cape is hidden automatically when wearing a backpack
* ⌨ **Keybind Access** — open your backpack by pressing **B** while wearing it
* 🔁 **Chestplate Compatibility** — backpacks can be worn together with chest armor (depending on config)

### ⚙️ Designed for Modpacks
Good Backpacks is built with modpack creators in mind:
* No forced balance choices
* No unnecessary combat bonuses
* Clean integration into vanilla and modded gameplay
* Works great for survival, exploration, and RPG-style packs

### 🧭 Gameplay Philosophy
This mod enhances inventory management without breaking immersion or balance. Whether you want a simple backpack or a fully custom system tailored to your modpack, **Good Backpacks** gives you complete control.

🎒 **Your backpack — your rules.**
